name: BB:CategoryDefinition: System Errors and Failures
notes: Edit this BB to include all events that may indicate a system error or failure. By default, this BB applies when the event category for the event is one of the following System categories: Service Failure, System Error, System Failure.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: System Errors and Failures on events which are detected by the undefined system
conditions_text: where the Event Category for the event is one of the following System.Service Failure, System.System Error, System.System Failure , System.Failed Application Modification, System.Failed Configuration Modification, System.Failed File Modification, System.Failed Host-Policy Modification, System.Failed Registry Modification, System.Failed Service Modification, System.Failed Stack Modification
TD_list: APPLY BB:CategoryDefinition: System Errors and Failures on events which are detected by the undefined system

AND where the Event Category for the event is one of the following System.Service Failure, System.System Error, System.System Failure , System.Failed Application Modification, System.Failed Configuration Modification, System.Failed File Modification, System.Failed Host-Policy Modification, System.Failed Registry Modification, System.Failed Service Modification, System.Failed Stack Modification
